narrative:
Salem Township has 1,524 registered voters, with 52.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 39.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 30.2 percentage points.
